name: Jumping Clones
author: Poki
description: Jumping Clones is a puzzle game created by Robert Alvarez. In this game you will have to complete a platform level full of special mechanics, but the twist is : you are controlling multiple characters at the same time ! You will have to use you thinking skills to synchronize movements or use terrain to move around. Will you be able to complete all levels ? Let's jump ! Controls: Arrow keys or WASD About the creator: Jumping Clones was created by Robert Alvarez. They have other games on Poki : Resizer , Block Toggle and Isotiles .
